narrative:
Pleasant Township has 2,180 registered voters, with 54.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.4 percentage points.
